{"query":"The Bear total Emmy Awards wins number Season 5 2026 Emmys eligibility","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1940,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.televisionacademy.com/shows/bear","title":"The Bear | Emmy Awards and Nominations  | Television Academy","content":"The nominees for Outstanding Comedy Series are Abbott Elementary, The Bear, Hacks, Margo's Got Money Troubles, Nobody Wants This, Only Murders In The Building, Shrinking and Widow's Bay.
Liza Colón-Zayas from The Bear talks to Albert Lawrence backstage at the 76th Emmy Awards after winning the Emmy for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Comedy Series."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/lists/emmy-nominations-full-list-nominees-scorecard/","title":"2026 Emmy Nominations Full List: All the Nominees","content":"Overall, last year’s Drama Series champ The Pitt leads all nominees this morning with 25, followed by the final season of Hacks on the comedy side with 24 — a record for nominations in a single season for a comedy.
Apple TV’s Widow’s Bay was third with 19 noms, followed by fellow Apple first-year show Pluribus with 18 and Netflix’s Beef with 16.
Note that some programs that one might have expected to get Emmy noms aren’t eligible this year for various reasons, including buzzy drama Heated Rivalry.
Winners of the 2026 Emmy Awards will be feted on Monday, September 14 — shifting from the usual Sunday slot because of an NFL game on NBC.
The ceremony at the Peacock Theater in Los Angeles will be hosted by network icon Mariska Hargitay, who begins her 28th season as star of Law & Order: SVU in the fall.
Here are the scorecards for the shows and platforms with the most nominations, per the TV Academy, followed by the full list of nominees."},{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/2026-emmy-nominations-full-list-pitt-pluribus-bear-hacks/","title":"2026 Emmy nominations are announced. See the full list. - CBS News","content":"The nominations for the 78th annual Primetime Emmy Awards were announced Wednesday morning in Los Angeles, with the final season of HBO Max's "Hacks" setting a new record for the most nominations in a single year for a comedy series.
"Hacks" earned 24 nominations in this year's race, topping the record of 23 set by "The Bear" and "The Studio" last year.
One show that was left unmentioned was the breakout hit "Heated Rivalry," which was ineligible for Emmy Awards as it was financed outside of the U.S.
The show is eligible for the International Emmy Awards and has already taken home 16 awards at the 2026 Canadian Screen Awards.
Rob Reiner earned a posthumous Emmy nomination for his role in "The Bear." Reiner and his wife, Michele Singer Reiner, were found dead in their Los Angeles home last December.
Their son, Nick Reiner, was arrested and charged with their deaths.
The nominations were announced by recent winners Liza Colón-Zayas and Jeff Hiller at the Television Academy in Los Angeles.
The 78th annual Primetime Emmy Awards will be broadcast live on NBC on Monday, Sept.
14, with actress Mariska Hargitay as host.
The show will also stream on Peacock.
"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms" (HBO Max)"},{"url":"https://www.goldderby.com/tv/2026/the-bear-emmy-odds-season-4-season-5-campaign-strategy/","title":"Can 'The Bear' ride rave reviews to Emmy glory again?","content":"Jun 26, 2026 — 2026 Emmys: 5 stars. Over the course of its run so far, the show has won 21 trophies from 49 nominations — an enviable record, indeed."}]}

The launch of Season 2 effectively served as an Emmy turbo boost for Season 1, which had just earned 13 nominations and would go on to win 10. For all those who complain that the TV Academy rewards the same shows over and over, remember that there's always a first time; and the 2023 Emmy Awards was that anointment for *The Bear*, which at that point set a record for the most wins in a single year for a comedy series (no one was complaining back then about the category).","score":0.5780915,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/2026-emmy-nominations-full-list-pitt-pluribus-bear-hacks","title":"2026 Emmy nominations are announced.
